description_long: This is a modern, cylindrical screwdriver with a predominantly metallic body and a sleek, industrial design. The handle features ribbed, dark gray grip sections at both ends, likely made of rubber or textured plastic for improved ergonomics. The central shaft is silver with a vertical blue accent window, possibly indicating a functional or decorative element. The tip and the end cap are both black, with the tip appearing to be a standard screwdriver head, though the exact type is not clearly visible. The top of the handle is capped with a translucent blue dome, which may serve as a design accent or a functional indicator. The overall construction suggests durability and a contemporary aesthetic suitable for urban toolkits.
description: A sleek, metallic screwdriver with ribbed dark gray grips, a blue accent window, and a translucent blue dome at the top. The design is modern and ergonomic, with a sturdy central shaft and black tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue accent window on the shaft and the translucent blue dome at the top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the ribbed grip and the blue dome, with the blue accent window partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the blue accent window not visible, showing the plain metallic shaft and black tip.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the ribbed grip and blue dome, with no visible accent window.
attribute_handle_type: straight, ribbed, likely rubberized or textured plastic for grip
